# Type widening fixture

This fixture is copied from `kernel/tests/data/type-widening` in
delta-kernel-rs v0.23.0. It was generated by Delta Spark and uses the
`typeWidening-preview` reader feature.

Spark CRC files are omitted. The Delta log and both Parquet data files are
retained so the integration test exercises physical-to-logical widening for
rows written before and after the schema change.
